summary: Frontend UI/UX testing completed for Blendlink super app. All 6 test cases passed: 1) Referral code auto-populate from URL works correctly with green styling and lock, 2) Casino shows 'Coming Soon' for non-admin users, 3) Casino is accessible to admin users, 4) Minted Photos page displays correctly with 12 photos and view mode buttons, 5) Photo Game Arena loads correctly with all features, 6) Scrolling works on landing, minted-photos, and photo-game pages. Fixed one bug: added missing game states to bottom nav hiding logic.
seed_data_creation: Updated test@blendlink.com user to have role: 'admin' and is_admin: true in test_database for Casino access testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX features tested and working: 1) Referral auto-populate with ?ref=CODE URL param, 2) Casino restriction for non-admin users, 3) Bottom nav hiding in game states (fixed by adding pvp_create, match_history, live_battles to activeGameStates), 4) Minted photos display with flip functionality, 5) Photo game arena with all battle options, 6) Scrolling on all pages. Admin user credentials: test@blendlink.com / admin

tests_performed.details: TESTCODE auto-populated in locked referral field with green styling and checkmark
Casino shows 'Coming Soon' with 'Stay Tuned!' badge for non-admin users
Casino is fully accessible to admin users with all game options visible
12 photo cards displayed with Portfolio Value, view mode buttons (Grid, Card, List)
Page loads with all features: Create New Game, Browse & Join, Match History, Watch Live, Play with Bot

tests_performed.test: Bottom nav hiding in game states
tests_performed.details: Fixed by adding pvp_create, match_history, live_battles to activeGameStates array
Scrolling works correctly, scrolled from 0 to 2308px

bug_fixed.issue: Bottom nav not hiding in pvp_create, match_history, live_battles game states
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'pvp_create', 'match_history', 'live_battles' to activeGameStates array in useEffect hook
